review_text: Outstanding experience! The Lamb Rogan Josh exceeded all expectations. Lamb Rogan Josh was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Decent food but nothing special. Garlic Naan were okay. Garlic Naan lacked the punch I expected.
Wow! Just wow! Naan  Samosa (2 pcs)  and Palak Paneer were all fantastic. Naan was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Disaster! Masala Chai  Garlic Naan  and Palak Paneer were all stale. Masala Chai had a weird smell. Completely unacceptable!
Terrible experience! Aloo Tikki Chaat  Fish Curry  and Garlic Naan were all inedible. Fish Curry was completely burnt. Waste of money!
Good quality food. Jeera Rice  Tandoori Roti  Malai Kofta  and Chicken Biryani were nicely done. Tandoori Roti could have been slightly spicier but still good!
Perfect in every way! Kulfi and Vegetable Biryani were all excellent. Kulfi stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
Enjoyed the Dal Makhani  Palak Paneer  and Chole Bhature! Dal Makhani was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Mixed feelings. Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Chicken Biryani  Chole Bhature  Fish Curry  and Aloo Tikki Chaat were acceptable. Fish Curry was decent but portion was small for the price.
Mediocre. Fish Curry  Dal Makhani  Mango Lassi  and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) were fine but forgettable. Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) didn't stand out.

Best Indian food in UAE! Butter Naan and Tandoori Roti were incredible. Tandoori Roti had the perfect balance of spices. Five stars!
